title: Voice loop — PTT / VAD / wake-word sub-modes with silero-vad
what_failed: Pi had no voice interaction loop — only keyboard input was supported.
fix_applied: agent/voice_loop.py: VoiceLoop class with ptt/vad/wake modes. ptt_record() blocks on Enter key. vad_record() uses silero-vad to detect speech onset (ring buffer pre-capture) and silence cutoff (1.5s). Falls back to fixed 5s recording if torch/silero unavailable. Voice commands added to pi_agent.py: 'voice', 'voice vad', 'voice wake'.
